sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing In Search of the Myreque

lines.speaker: Polmafi Ferdygris
lines.text: Not so good. It's great to see you're helping us out though.

sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing In Aid of the Myreque

lines.speaker: Polmafi Ferdygris
lines.text: Hey there. It's great of you to do all this work for Veliaf. I've heard him say some good things about you. Keep up the good work and I'm sure you'll be invited to become a full member of the Myreque!

sections.title: Standard dialogue after finishing Darkness of Hallowvale

lines.speaker: Polmafi Ferdygris
lines.text: Hey there. It's brilliant that you've been made into a full member of the Myreque!

lines.speaker: Polmafi Ferdygris
lines.text: Keep up the good work, I'm sure Veliaf appreciates it.

sections.title: Dialogue after finishing A Taste of Hope but haven't started Sins of the Father

lines.speaker: Polmafi Ferdygris
lines.text: Hey there. It's brilliant that you've been made into a full member of the Myreque!

lines.speaker: Polmafi Ferdygris
lines.text: Keep up the good work, I'm sure Veliaf appreciates it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. Speaking of Veliaf, where is he?

lines.speaker: Polmafi Ferdygris
lines.text: He's out on business. Don't worry, he knows how to take care of himself.
